name: Meeting Room
description: Used for faction councils, A.R.K. briefings, leader discussions, reflection sessions, and Human Override meetings.

name: Tent Room
description: Sleeping and personal equipment area for the Rover factions.
safetyNote: Keep paths clear and personal equipment properly organized.

name: First Aid Room
description: The main medical and wellbeing point for first aid, hydration checks, fatigue reports, and emergencies.
safetyNote: Report injuries, pain, fatigue, or illness immediately.

name: Resources Room
description: Storage area for food supplies, water, ropes, tools, ration cards, laboratory materials, and faction mission equipment.
safetyNote: No equipment may be removed without permission.

name: Flag Pole
description: Main flag-raising, flag-lowering, formation, and announcement point.

name: Science and Research Laboratory
description: The thematic A.R.K. laboratory where Rovers study the fictional infection, investigate the captured infected subject, analyze simulated samples, and complete the Vaccine Protocol activity.
safetyNote: Do not touch laboratory materials unless instructed by a leader.

name: Fire Pit
description: Central area for unit campfires, reflection circles, songs, evening discussions, and Sahret Samar.
safetyNote: Fire activity must remain under leader supervision.

name: Central Courtyard
description: The main open area used for formations, active games, reaction challenges, briefings, and faction activities.

name: Target Activity Range
description: A controlled and supervised area for approved accuracy-based Scout activities and themed target challenges.
safetyNote: Entry is prohibited without the responsible leader.

name: Entrance Hatch A
description: First underground access point shown in Cross Section A-A.
accessLevel: Leaders only unless specifically opened for a supervised activity
safetyNote: Do not enter or approach without permission.

name: Entrance Hatch B
description: Second underground access point shown in Cross Section B-B.
accessLevel: Leaders only unless specifically opened for a supervised activity
safetyNote: Do not enter or approach without permission.

name: Main Entrance
description: The primary controlled entrance to The Last Outpost, located between the two underground hatches.

name: Reinforced Perimeter
description: The outer boundary of The Last Outpost.
accessLevel: Do not cross except during approved missions
safetyNote: All night activities must remain within the marked camp boundaries.

name: Emergency Assembly Point
description: The location where all participants gather during an emergency, Breach Alert, evacuation drill, or headcount.
